roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/X:DEFENDANT APPEARS VIA ZOOM/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 02-16-21 (60TH)/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITHALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:HOME DETENTION/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WS/RX/CTORD:NO BURGLERY TOOLS/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 90 MINUTES/X:COMBINED WITH CO-DET (20013226)/DOP/SA2:21 CLARENCE WAY, SF, CA,/SAORD3/SAORD/X: THESE ARE AMENDED MINUTES AS OF 12-16-20/
/MO PC 1385:ON DA'S MOTION UNABLE TO SUSTAIN/EMTERM/SATERM/
